summary: Deep research document covering cutting-edge model architectures across 4 domains (detection, tracking, prediction, anomaly detection) for the Singapore Smart City project. Each section covers the SOTA landscape, identifies what's novel vs commodity, proposes a specific novel contribution the user can make, and assesses feasibility on Colab. Includes a recommended 'novel stack' that combines weather-adaptive YOLO modifications, graph-based tracking, spatial-temporal graph transformer prediction, and trajectory autoencoder anomaly detection.
